Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Husz0uR2nFgnhig9pzYLw/cdca62f8186fb28955e9fc84775a0f5d/common_list_of_schengen_travel_medical_insurance_companies_november_2024.pdf) to see the list of the recognized Travel medical

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Religious Purpose visa is granted for those applicants, invited by religious organizations, to visit Italy for religious purposes.
(Maximum duration of stay: 90 days)
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on
                                                                                    their chosen appointment date and time.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Religious Purpose visa is granted for those applicants, invited by religious organizations, to visit Italy for religious purposes.
(Maximum duration of stay: 90 days)
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on
                                                                                    their chosen appointment date and time.

## Visa Fees

[ita > tha > en > Table:RELIGIOUS REASONS > Visa Fees 1]
Fee information:
The above visa fees are not subject to VAT; while the VFS service fee is subject to VAT
Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card and QR code 
All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application

## Documents Required
Please check the following link to understand the documentation required for the Italy Religious Purposes Visa.
Checklist for the documents (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1DAdfwKxYXNRetYIyy2clX/b71e7ad2debd425cf99f2539ee0e5771/RELIGIOUS-REASONS-New.pdf)
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Husz0uR2nFgnhig9pzYLw/cdca62f8186fb28955e9fc84775a0f5d/common_list_of_schengen_travel_medical_insurance_companies_november_2024.pdf) to see the list of the recognized Travel medical
                                                                                    Insurance Companies.
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/ita/travel-insurance)

## Photo specifications
Please note: The photographs used to apply for the visa must meet the standards set out below.
Please bring 2 photographs taken within 6 months of age that are color photographs and have the following characteristics:
- The background is light (white or cream). that can make the applicant's face clearly visible.
- Focus on the applicant's face and have high definition.
- Print on paper used for good quality photography.
- See all faces. Not smiling (no glasses, hats, or headscarves) However, the embassy still allows applicants to wear religious headscarves.
- Please attach only the photo with glue to the visa application form (no stapler) and for the second photo, submit it along with other documents to the officer at the visa application center.
- Caution:
If the photo does not meet the requirements listed above, it may affect the consideration of your visa application. Therefore, you should be careful in complying with the conditions set.

## Period of application consideration
You can apply for a (short-term) Schengen visa within 90 days before your trip.
The processing time for visa applications takes 15 calendar days.  In some cases, the processing time may be extended to 45 days or more at the discretion of the Italian Embassy for any reason.
Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.
Applicants must read the information on this website carefully. The details provided on this website will help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. And it will reduce the chance that your visa application documents will be incomplete or delayed.

## Download Forms
SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION FORM (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1r5Z101ZR4fL7wbvmiURx8/2666edeb32772f867834a25b60155e84/Modulo-Visto-Schengen-Aggiornato-2025.pdf)

visa_types.name: Long-term Visa (D)
visa_types.overview:
National Visa (Long Stay Type D)
The collection of applications for Long Term National Visa (for periods of stay in Italy exceeding 90 days) does not fall within VFS Global’s jurisdiction. The request of any type of
                                                                        National Visa together with proper documentation should be submitted in person directly at the Visa Office of the Embassy.
Please refer to:
27th Floor. CRC Tower, All Seasons Place  
87 Wireless Road, Lumpini, Phatumwan, Bangkok 10330 
 Tel (+66) 02 250 4970  
Fax (+66) 02 250 4986  
Website https://ambbangkok.esteri.it/Ambasciata_Bangkok/en/ (https://ambbangkok.esteri.it/Ambasciata_Bangkok/en/) 
Email Bangkok.visti@esteri.it (mailto:bangkok.visti@esteri.it)
For further information please contact the Visa Office of the Embassy of Italy in Bangkok.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5CyX84LcYIobhrC9bQXKkL/ba48d0736b98831cbea8ef955be9e839/mudulo-visto-schengen.pdf) to download the Application Form for Long Stay Visa
                                                                    
For Documents Enquiry please visit below website: 
www.ambbangkok.esteri.it (http://www.ambbangkok.esteri.it/)

The collection of applications for Long Term National Visa (for periods of stay in Italy exceeding 90 days) does not fall within VFS Global’s jurisdiction. The request of any type of

Fax (+66) 02 250 4986

www.ambbangkok.esteri.it (http://www.ambbangkok.esteri.it/)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The airport transit visa allows a foreign national subject to the obligation to enter the international transit area of airports without actually entering the territory of the Contracting
                                                                            Party which issued the visa. 
(Maximum duration of stay: 24 hours, Applicant cannot leave the airport) 
This kind of Visa is also granted to Seamen who need to embark a ship docked in an Italian Port.
Seamen are not required to book an appointment to lodge their application for transit Visa and they can walk-in as they can benefit of our dedicated counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The airport transit visa allows a foreign national subject to the obligation to enter the international transit area of airports without actually entering the territory of the Contracting
                                                                            Party which issued the visa. 
(Maximum duration of stay: 24 hours, Applicant cannot leave the airport) 
This kind of Visa is also granted to Seamen who need to embark a ship docked in an Italian Port.
Seamen are not required to book an appointment to lodge their application for transit Visa and they can walk-in as they can benefit of our dedicated counter.

## Visa Fees

[ita > tha > en > Table:TRANSIT > Visa Fees 1]
Fee information: 
- The above visa fees are not subject to VAT; while the VFS service fee is subject to VAT
- Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card, online payment (soon)
- All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application

## Documents Required
Please check the following link to understand the documentation required for the Italy Transit Visa:
Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3iDO5ZnzrFy8zsz3MqyVtv/d4437c960cac0936845fc175bdb2669e/airport-transit-Checklist.pdf) for the documents
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Husz0uR2nFgnhig9pzYLw/cdca62f8186fb28955e9fc84775a0f5d/common_list_of_schengen_travel_medical_insurance_companies_november_2024.pdf) to see the list of the recognized Travel medical Insurance
                                                                            Companies.
                                                                        
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/ita/travel-insurance)

## Photo specifications
Please note: The photographs used to apply for the visa must meet the standards set out below.
Please bring 2 photographs taken within 6 months of age that are color photographs and have the following characteristics:
- The background is light (white or cream). that can make the applicant's face clearly visible.
- Focus on the applicant's face and have high definition.
- Print on paper used for good quality photography.
- See all faces. Not smiling (no glasses, hats, or headscarves) However, the embassy still allows applicants to wear religious headscarves.
- Please attach only the photo with glue to the visa application form (no stapler) and for the second photo, submit it along with other documents to the officer at the visa application center.
- Caution:
If the photo does not meet the requirements listed above, it may affect the consideration of your visa application. Therefore, you should be careful in complying with the conditions set.

## Period of application consideration
You can apply for a (short-term) Schengen visa within 90 days before your trip.
The processing time for visa applications takes 15 calendar days.  In some cases, the processing time may be extended to 45 days or more at the discretion of the Italian Embassy for any reason.
Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.
Applicants must read the information on this website carefully. The details provided on this website will help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. And it will reduce the chance that your visa application documents will be incomplete or delayed.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows an applicant to enter Italy to study in Italian universities or other eligible institutions/schools or for professional trainings for a short period of stay.
(Maximum duration of stay: 90 days)
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on
                                                                                    their chosen appointment date and time.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The visa of Mission is granted to the foreign national who, for reasons linked to his/her function in politics, government or public utility, must travel to Italy.
Therefore, foreign nationals who hold government posts or who are employees of public administration, public institutions or international organizations, and sent to Italy for reasons related to their functions, have access to such visa.
For Missions of 90 days, download the request form of the Schengen Visa, C, and provide the following documents.
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on their chosen appointment date and time.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The visa of Mission is granted to the foreign national who, for reasons linked to his/her function in politics, government or public utility, must travel to Italy.
Therefore, foreign nationals who hold government posts or who are employees of public administration, public institutions or international organizations, and sent to Italy for reasons related to their functions, have access to such visa.
For Missions of 90 days, download the request form of the Schengen Visa, C, and provide the following documents.
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on their chosen appointment date and time.

## Visa Fees

[ita > tha > en > Table:MISSION > Visa Fees 1]
Fee information:
The above visa fees are not subject to VAT; while the VFS service fee is subject to VAT
Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card and QR code 
All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application

If the photo does not meet the requirements listed above, it may affect the consideration of your visa application. Therefore, you should be careful in complying with the conditions set.

Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.

Overview

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This kind of Visa applies to those who are invited to visit family, friends in Italy.
(Maximum duration of stay: 90 days)
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on
                                                                                    their chosen appointment date and time.

## Visa Fees

[ita > tha > en > Table:TOURISM – VISIT TO FAMILY/FRIENDS > Visa Fees 1]
Fee information:
The above visa fees are not subject to VAT; while the VFS service fee is subject to VAT
Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card and QR code 
All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application

## Documents Required
Please check the following link to understand the documentation required for Visit family and friends Visa:
Checklist  for the documents (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3kMM9UvApIk7AZq8OA72yk/3f858107141f5d63594008b0a3815d3c/TOURISM-VISIT-TO-FAMILY-FRIENDS-New.pdf)
Proof of sponsorship and/or private accommodation 
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1Husz0uR2nFgnhig9pzYLw/cdca62f8186fb28955e9fc84775a0f5d/common_list_of_schengen_travel_medical_insurance_companies_november_2024.pdf) to see the list of the recognized Travel medical  Insurance Companies.
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/ita/travel-insurance)

## Photo specifications
Please note: The photographs used to apply for the visa must meet the standards set out below.
Please bring 2 photographs taken within 6 months of age that are color photographs and have the following characteristics:
- The background is light (white or cream). that can make the applicant's face clearly visible.
- Focus on the applicant's face and have high definition.
- Print on paper used for good quality photography.
- See all faces. Not smiling (no glasses, hats, or headscarves) However, the embassy still allows applicants to wear religious headscarves.
- Please attach only the photo with glue to the visa application form (no stapler) and for the second photo, submit it along with other documents to the officer at the visa application center.
- Caution:If the photo does not meet the requirements listed above, it may affect the consideration of your visa application. Therefore, you should be careful in complying with the conditions set.

## Period of application consideration
You can apply for a (short-term) Schengen visa within 90 days before your trip.
The processing time for visa applications takes 15 calender days. In some cases, the processing time may be extended to 45 days or more at the discretion of the Italian Embassy for any reason.
Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.
Applicants must read the information on this website carefully. The details provided on this website will help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. And it will reduce the chance that your visa application documents will be incomplete or delayed.

## Download Forms
 Visa Application form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1r5Z101ZR4fL7wbvmiURx8/2666edeb32772f867834a25b60155e84/Modulo-Visto-Schengen-Aggiornato-2025.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are invited by an Italian company / business partner to visit Italy for business purposes for a short period of stay (not more than 90 days).
Applicants falling under this category are not required to book an appointment as they can just walk-in and benefit of our dedicated Business counter.
Invitations to cultural activities, conferences and meetings other than commercial are out of the business scope and do not fall under this Visa Type.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are invited by an Italian company / business partner to visit Italy for business purposes for a short period of stay (not more than 90 days).
Applicants falling under this category are not required to book an appointment as they can just walk-in and benefit of our dedicated Business counter.
Invitations to cultural activities, conferences and meetings other than commercial are out of the business scope and do not fall under this Visa Type.

## Visa Fees

[ita > tha > en > Table:BUSINESS > Visa Fees 1]
Fee information:
The above visa fees are not subject to VAT; while the VFS service fee is subject to VAT
Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card and QR code
All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application

## Documents Required
Please check the following link to understand the documentation required for the Italy Business Visa:
Checklist for the documents (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Ye3wh1gzhtArPMcxxHG9q/1fa1ddc160a382ff9d34ecd5a644f667/BUSINESS-New.pdf)

Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/ita/travel-insurance)

## Photo specifications
Please note: The photographs used to apply for the visa must meet the standards set out below.

Please bring 2 photographs taken within 6 months of age that are color photographs and have the following characteristics:
- The background is light (white or cream). that can make the applicant's face clearly visible.
- Focus on the applicant's face and have high definition.
- Print on paper used for good quality photography.
- See all faces. Not smiling (no glasses, hats, or headscarves) However, the embassy still allows applicants to wear religious headscarves.
- Please attach only the photo with glue to the visa application form (no stapler) and for the second photo, submit it along with other documents to the officer at the visa application center.
- Caution: If the photo does not meet the requirements listed above, it may affect the consideration of your visa application. Therefore, you should be careful in complying with the conditions set.

## Period of application consideration
You can apply for a (short-term) Schengen visa within 90 days before your trip.
The processing time for visa applications takes 15 working days. In some cases, the processing time may be extended to 45 days or more at the discretion of the Italian Embassy for any reason.
Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.
Applicants must read the information on this website carefully. The details provided on this website will help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. And it will reduce the chance that your visa application documents will be incomplete or delayed.

SCHENGEN VISA APPLICATION FORM (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1r5Z101ZR4fL7wbvmiURx8/2666edeb32772f867834a25b60155e84/Modulo-Visto-Schengen-Aggiornato-2025.pdf)

Fee information:

Accepted mode of payment: cash, credit/debit card, online payment (soon)
All fees are non-refundable regardless of the outcome of the application
visa_types.processing_time:
Application for a Schengen (short-term) visa can be filed within 90 days preceding the planned trip. Applications are in most cases reviewed within 5 working days. In individual cases, the review period can be extended up to 30 days and more at the discretion of the Embassy of Italy for any reason. It is recommended not to file a visa application later than 15 days before the trip, as it cannot be otherwise guaranteed it will be reviewed in time.
Visa Application Centre has no right to influence anyhow the processing time of visa applications as well to accelerate the application.
Please note that you may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a personal interview at the Italian Embassy prior to a decision being taken on your application. The Embassy also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents during the visa application process. Applicants are requested to read the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site helps you to prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the chances of your application being incomplete or delayed.

(Maximum duration of stay: 90 days)
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on their chosen
                                                                            appointment date and time.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is issued to sports people (athletes and trainers) invited to participate in competitions (both professionals and amateurs) only for a short term period of time,
                                                                                    maximum 90 days. The issuance of this visa must be requested by the competent Italian Federation and duly authorized by the Italian National Olympic Committee (C.O.N.I.).
Applicants falling under this category must book an appointment to submit their visa application and have their biometric data registered at VFS Visa Application Center on
                                                                                    their chosen appointment date and time.

## Period of application consideration
You can apply for a (short-term) Schengen visa within 90 days before your trip.
The processing time for visa applications takes 15 calendar days. In some cases, the processing time may be extended to 45 days or more at the discretion of the Italian Embassy for any reason.
Visa applicants are advised to submit their visa application documents no less than 15 days  to travel as it cannot be guaranteed that your application will be considered in time for travel.
The Visa Application Center does not have any rights/influence. Extension of time for visa application or speed up considering a visa application
Please note:
You may be required to present yourself to a visa officer at the Italian consulate for an interview before the embassy can consider your visa application.
The embassy reserves the right to request additional documents during the visa application process.
Applicants must read the information on this website carefully. The details provided on this website will help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. And it will reduce the chance that your visa application documents will be incomplete or delayed.
